MOTION To Appoint Lynn Faust As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CHARLES OHLENSCHLAGER MOTION to Appoint Lynn Faust as Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff and For Leave to File First Amended Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: JoAnn Bryce CSR 3321
